scripts.dev: npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.check: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
